zh.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo是Pietro II Orseolo和Maria Candiano的兒子，於0992年出生在義大利維圖維其亞維其亞。他和Maria Princess Of Hungary至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1032年在土耳其易斯坦波爾享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo是Pietro II Orseolo和Maria Candiano的儿子，于0992年出生在意大利維圖維其亞維其亞。他和Maria Princess Of Hungary至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1032年在土耳其易斯坦波爾享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo was born in 0992, in Venice, Venice, Veneto, Italy as the son of Pietro II Orseolo and Maria Candiano. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Maria Princess Of Hungary. He died in 1032, in İstanbul, Türkiye, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo est né en 0992, à Venise, Venezia, Veneto, Italie, fils de Pietro II Orseolo et Maria Candiano. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Maria Princess Of Hungary. Il est décédé en 1032, à İstanbul, Turquie, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo wurde 0992 in Venedig, Venezia, Veneto, Italien, als Sohn von Pietro II Orseolo und Maria Candiano geboren. Er hatte mit Maria Princess Of Hungary mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1032 im Alter von 40 Jahren in İstanbul, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo è nato il nel 0992 nel Venezia, Venezia, Veneto, Italia come figlio di Pietro II Orseolo e Maria Candiano. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Maria Princess Of Hungary. Morì nel 1032, nel İstanbul, Turchia, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto Orseoloは0992年にイタリアベンエトーベンエズアベンエズアでPietro II OrseoloとMaria Candianoの息子として生まれた。彼はMaria Princess Of Hungaryとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1032年にトルコイスタンブルで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo(은)는 0992년 이탈리아 븐토 븐지아 븐지아에서 Pietro II Orseolo(와)과 Maria Candiano의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Maria Princess Of Hungary(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1032년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo nasceu em 0992, em Venezia, Venezia, Veneto, Itália filho de Pietro II Orseolo e Maria Candiano. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Maria Princess Of Hungary. Ele faleceu em 1032, em İstanbul, Turquia, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo родился в 0992 г. в местности винезя, винезя, винето, Италия. Его родителей звали Pietro II Orseolo и Maria Candiano. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Maria Princess Of Hungary. Он умер в 1032 г. в местности истанбул, Турция в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Otto Orseolo nació en 0992, en Venezia, Venezia, Veneto, Italia como hijo de Pietro II Orseolo y Maria Candiano. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Maria Princess Of Hungary. Murió en 1032, en İstanbul, Turquía, a la edad de 40 años.
